title: Nerf Bone Meal
description:
Bone Meal doesn't affect crops and saplings
Composting moss results in less Bone Meal
body:
With this mod installed, Bone Meal can't be used on
- Bamboo
- Cocoa
- Any crops
- Kelp
- Saplings
- Berry Bushes

Composting any moss items also only yields one third as much Bone Meal.
This should make it impossible to create a fully automatic Bone Meal-farm using moss.

Only needed on the server
